title: MoSPI macro-statistics data sources (connector)
purpose: The official India macro/statistics backdrop the twin lacked — 25 MoSPI datasets, each tagged for investment relevance and linked to the twin layer it informs.

access_routes: Official API: api.mospi.gov.in/api/<dataset>/... with dataset-specific params (see swagger); viz at /viz/<dataset>.
MoSPI MCP connector (session tool): list_datasets -> get_indicators -> get_metadata -> get_data. Filter codes are arbitrary and per-dataset; take them from get_metadata.
quirks: RBI forex series lags ~13 months — prefer rbi.org.in WSSView scrape for current reserves.
WPI/IIP prints with large jumps need cross-check vs press release.

data_sources.name: National Accounts Statistics
data_sources.coverage: GDP, GVA, growth, savings, capital formation, trade — 22 annual + 11 quarterly macro aggregates
data_sources.twin_link: Decade report card (L05) macro backdrop; GDP growth frames the pipeline

data_sources.name: Consumer Price Index
data_sources.coverage: Retail inflation, 600+ items, base 2024; state + all-India
data_sources.twin_link: Cost-of-living context for siting; food/fuel inflation feeds AIF/FPI relevance

data_sources.name: Wholesale Price Index
data_sources.coverage: Producer/wholesale inflation, 1000+ items, 5 levels

data_sources.name: Index of Industrial Production
data_sources.coverage: Industrial output — manufacturing, mining, electricity; use-based classes
data_sources.twin_link: Electronic Mfg & manufacturing sector momentum (L26); pairs with ASI

data_sources.name: Periodic Labour Force Survey
data_sources.coverage: Jobs, unemployment, wages, LFPR/WPR; annual/quarterly/monthly
data_sources.twin_link: Labour-codes watchlist (L28); talent/wage context for siting

data_sources.name: RBI Statistics
data_sources.coverage: Foreign trade by country/commodity, BoP, forex reserves, exchange rates (155 currencies), external debt
data_sources.twin_link: External-sector context; complements india-trade-tracker EIDB flows

data_sources.name: Annual Survey of Industries
data_sources.coverage: Factory-sector financials — capital, wages, GVA, fuel, profitability by NIC

data_sources.name: Renewable Energy (MNRE)
data_sources.coverage: State-wise monthly installed RE capacity (MW): solar/wind/hydro/bio, rooftop, KUSUM
data_sources.twin_link: NGHM SIGHT & RE incentives (L17/25); Electricity Generation pipeline (L26)

data_sources.name: Energy Statistics
data_sources.coverage: Energy balance — supply/consumption by commodity & sector (KToE/PJ)
data_sources.twin_link: Energy-cost & fuel-mix context for Oil&Gas/Power sectors (L26)

data_sources.name: Economic Census
data_sources.coverage: District-wise establishment & worker counts (EC4-6)
data_sources.twin_link: Where enterprises already cluster — siting demand signal

data_sources.name: Annual Survey of Unincorporated Enterprises
data_sources.coverage: Informal/MSME sector — counts, GVA, digital adoption, registration

data_sources.name: Household Consumption Expenditure Survey
data_sources.coverage: MPCE, food/non-food, Gini inequality across 12 fractiles

data_sources.name: All India Survey on Higher Education
data_sources.coverage: Universities, colleges, enrolment, GER, PTR

data_sources.name: UDISE+ (School Education)
data_sources.coverage: 46 indicators — schools, enrolment, dropout, teachers, infrastructure

data_sources.name: National Family Health Survey
data_sources.coverage: Health & demographics — fertility, mortality, nutrition, NCDs

data_sources.name: Gender Statistics
data_sources.coverage: 147 indicators — health, education, labour, leadership, crime

data_sources.name: Environment Statistics
data_sources.coverage: 124 indicators — climate, water, forests, pollution, waste, disasters

data_sources.name: CPI Agricultural/Rural Labourers
data_sources.coverage: Rural inflation for AL/RL worker categories

data_sources.name: Time Use Survey
data_sources.coverage: Time allocation — paid/unpaid/care work by group

data_sources.name: NSS 77th — Land, Livestock & AIDIS
data_sources.coverage: Agri households, land ownership, farm income, household debt/assets

data_sources.name: NSS 78th — Living Conditions
data_sources.coverage: Water, sanitation, digital connectivity, migration, assets

data_sources.name: NSS 79th — CAMS + AYUSH
data_sources.coverage: Education, health expenditure, digital literacy, financial inclusion

data_sources.name: NSS 75th — Education
data_sources.coverage: Literacy, attainment, GAR/NAR, education expenditure

data_sources.name: NSS 76th — Disability + Housing/Water
data_sources.coverage: Disability prevalence; drinking water, housing quality, sanitation

data_sources.name: NSS 80th — Telecom + Education
data_sources.coverage: Mobile/internet usage, digital literacy, e-commerce, school expenditure

linkage.macro_backdrop: NAS/CPI/WPI/IIP/PLFS/RBI give the growth, inflation, industry, jobs and external-sector context that frames every incentive/land/project decision in layers 05/17/25/26.
linkage.sector_specific: ASI, MNRE, ENERGY, EC, ASUSE map to specific twin sectors (factory economics, renewable capacity, establishment clusters, MSME base).
linkage.cross_repo: RBI trade series complements india-trade-tracker EIDB flows; CPI/WPI complement agri-commodity-tracker.
